posts.text:
BREAKING: Iran’s President Pezeshkian releases a statement as in-person talks between the US and Iran begin in Pakistan:

“The high-ranking Iranian delegation that has arrived in Pakistan is a staunch guardian of Iran's interests with all its might, and in this vein, it will engage in negotiations with courage. In any case, our service to the people will not pause for a moment, and whatever the outcome of the negotiations may be, the government stands firmly by the people's side,” he says.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
